input.placeholder: Search candidates name, skills or role...

div.p: Experienced software engineer with 6+ years of expertise in building scalable web applications. Passionate about clean code, test-driven development, and mentoring junior developers. Strong background in React, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure.
Great cultural fit for the team

button.name: action_reopen
button.confirm: Are you sure to re-open this case

group.div: I confirm this information is accurate and complete to the best of my knowledge.
